intro: Outside of research and code, I make a genuine effort to maintain a life that isn't entirely pixels and terminals.

items.name: Reading
items.description: I primarily read non-fiction, but I'm also a huge Harry Potter fan. If I were sorted, I'm definitely more like a Slytherin.

items.name: Guitar
items.description: I love playing alternative rock. My absolute favorite guitarists are Synyster Gates from Avenged Sevenfold and Dimebag Darrell from Pantera.

items.name: Formula 1 Racing
items.description: My favorite driver is Max Verstappen, but I closely follow Oscar Piastri and Kimi Antonelli too. I also really like the style of Lewis Hamilton.

items.name: Skipping
items.description: This is my absolute favorite kind of cardio, and I actively do it for my daily HIIT workouts.

items.name: Swimming
items.description: A refreshing way to cool off, stay active, and push my breathing and physical endurance.

items.name: Cycling
items.description: The perfect way to spend a cool evening outdoors while exploring the city and getting some solid cardio in.
